title: Building Scalable Microservices with Spring Boot
description: A practical overview of developing scalable microservices using Java, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, REST APIs, MySQL, and Microservices Architecture based on my professional experience.

title: Developing Secure FinTech Applications with Java
description: Sharing my experience developing secure financial applications including RAAST, IBFT, customer services, debit card transactions, and REST APIs while working as a Java Backend Engineer.

title: REST API Best Practices in Spring Boot
description: Learn how to design secure, maintainable, and high-performance REST APIs using Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA, JWT authentication, exception handling, and clean architecture.
